strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput microservices — directly matches the role's seniority and breadth requirement
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — relevant cutting-edge AI builder experience

Founder of GISCollective and creator of multiple open-source tools (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Vibe.dav, CMSushi) plus conference talks and workshops — demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and thought leadership
concerns: No explicit Master's/PhD in AI, though the JD lists this as preferred rather than required
Cloud platform exposure is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not framed at hyperscaler-strategy scale
Director-level IC scope (advising strategic customers, shaping future cloud product state) is adjacent to but broader than prior staff-engineer roles

key_factors.factor: Entrepreneurial founder track record and open-source leadership

response.justification: James brings the rare combination the role asks for: 15+ years across software, infrastructure, embedded, and high-throughput systems, paired with current hands-on work on agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq — exactly the builder-fluent AI profile the JD prioritises. His founding of GISCollective, creation of multiple open-source frameworks, and a public record of talks and workshops show the entrepreneurial, inspire-others dimension the position demands, while cloud experience with AWS CDK and Kubernetes provides a credible base for advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption.
